name: Basic Roquefort Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the cheese with a small amount of salad oil until well combined.
2. Add Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, and vinegar to the mashed cheese.
3. Mix in the remaining salad oil until the dressing is creamy and balanced.
4. Shake well to combine all ingredients.
5. Enjoy your dressing.
